creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 247300
poudriere testport log

There is new version of www/phpbb3. I've made a patch which updates the port. It was tested with poudriere.

I've found that there is an open bug #272844, which updates phpbb3 to 3.3.10. But is not picked up till July (almost 6 months). I wrote a comment about new update but is seems that this bug is "forgetten" :-((( That's why I'm making a new one.
